# Mohammad Hamza Portfolio

Mohammad Hamza is a freelance web designer and frontend developer based in Aligarh, India.

Core services:
- UI/UX design
- Frontend development
- Responsive website development
- Performance optimization
- SEO optimization
- Redesign services
- Premium landing pages
- Practical full-stack integrations

Portfolio projects:
- The Nextwork: Digital Marketing Agency. A sharp agency presence for a digital marketing team, 
    rebuilt around fast navigation, direct inquiry paths and a confident service narrative. Live: https://thenextwork.in
- MF Dresses: Fashion Commerce. A fast static commerce experience for a fashion label, shaped 
    for quick product discovery, clean calls to action and smooth mobile browsing. Live: https://mfdresses.in
- ISC Java: Education Platform. An interactive learning destination for Java students, designed
    to make tutorials, practice and beginner concepts feel direct and approachable. Live: https://iscjava.vercel.app
- LocalReach: Local Business Growth. A polished web presence for a local growth service, focused
    on credibility, concise offers and lead capture for small business owners. Live: https://localreach.in
- Caryaire Engineers: Bareilly‑based institutional infrastructure partner specialising in HVAC, 
    procurement and turnkey execution for government and other various industrial sectors across India. Live: https://www.caryaireengineers.in
- HMZAAA Portfolio: Personal Brand System. A high-end personal brand interface for Mohammad Hamza, 
    engineered to communicate trust, speed and premium web craft within seconds. Live: https://hmzaaa.vercel.app

Contact:
- Email: hmzaaa.web@gmail.com
- Phone: +91 63076 04170
- Website: https://hmzaaa.vercel.app
